```{r}
    support_n = factor(support_n, levels = sort(unique(support_n))),
    high_breadth_flag = median_breadth_ff > label_breadth_cut,
    top_flag = driver_rank_within_pair <= n_label_per_pair,
    label_flag = top_flag | high_breadth_flag,
    label_reason = case_when(
      top_flag & high_breadth_flag ~ "top_rank_and_high_breadth",
      top_flag ~ "top_rank",
      high_breadth_flag ~ "high_breadth_only",
      TRUE ~ "unlabeled"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_bh, path1, path2, driver_rank_within_pair) %>%
  mutate(
    pair_gene = paste(pair_label, gene, sep = "___"),
    pair_gene = factor(pair_gene, levels = rev(unique(pair_gene)))
  )

x_max_bridge <- max(bridge_fig_df$median_breadth_ff, na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(x_max_bridge) || x_max_bridge <= 0) {
  x_max_bridge <- 0.05
}

#title and subtitle 

    # title = "Bridge genes contributing to significant pathway-pair overlaps",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Only pathway pairs with BH-adjusted permutation significance are shown. ",
    #   "All displayed genes were supported in >= ", min_methods_support,
    #   " methods and annotated to both pathways in the pair. ",
    #   "Within each pair, genes are ordered by tool support first, then by median FUBAR/FEL breadth. ",
    #   "Top ", n_label_per_pair, " genes per pair are labeled, and any additional genes with median FUBAR/FEL breadth > ",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " are also labeled."
    # ),



#theme for suppl figure

theme_bold1 <-  theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    #  Panel 
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),

    #  Axis titles 
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 16, face = "bold",
      margin = margin(t = 10)
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    
    #  Axis text  
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black",
      margin = margin(t = 4)
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"
    ),
    #  Axis lines 
    axis.line = element_line(size = 0.9, color = "black"),

    # Facet strips 
    strip.text = element_text(
      size = 16, face = "bold",
      margin = margin(t = 4, b = 4)
    ),
    strip.background = element_rect(
      fill = "grey94",
      color = "grey55",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ),

    # Legend 
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text  = element_text(),
    
    #  Plot title & caption 
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 8.5, hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 10)
    )
)



p_bridge_clean <- ggplot(
  bridge_fig_df,
  aes(x = median_breadth_ff, y = pair_gene)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = median_breadth_ff, yend = pair_gene),
    color = "grey88",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.3,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +
geom_point(
  aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
  shape = 21,
  size = 3.3,
  color = "black",
  stroke = 0.3
) +
# ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
#   data = bridge_fig_df %>% filter(!label_flag),
#   aes(
#     label = gene),
#   size = 4.0,
#   color = "black",
#   segment.color = "grey20",
#   segment.size = 0.3,
#   force = 0.25,                
#   max.overlaps = Inf,
#   direction = "y",
#   hjust = 0,
#   nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.25) +
ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
  data = bridge_fig_df %>% filter(label_flag),
  aes(label = gene),
  size = 5,
  color = "grey20",
  segment.color = "grey35",
  segment.size = 0.4,
  direction = "y",
  hjust = 0,
  nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.025,
  box.padding = 0.2,
  point.padding = 0.15,
  max.overlaps = Inf,
  min.segment.length = 0
)+
  facet_wrap(~ pair_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
scale_y_discrete(
  labels = function(x) sub("^.*___", "", x)
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, x_max_bridge * 1.08),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.08))
  ) +
  scale_fill_grey(
    start = 0.75,
    end = 0.25,
    name = "Methods supporting\npositive selection"
  ) +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Median gene-level positive-site breadth across FUBAR and FEL\n(proportion of codon sites inferred as positively selected; descriptive ordering only)",
    y = NULL,
    # title = "Bridge genes contributing to significant pathway-pair overlaps",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Only pathway pairs with BH-adjusted permutation significance are shown. ",
    #   "All displayed genes were supported in >= ", min_methods_support,
    #   " methods and annotated to both pathways in the pair. ",
    #   "Within each pair, genes are ordered by tool support first, then by median FUBAR/FEL breadth. ",
    #   "Top ", n_label_per_pair, " genes per pair are labeled, and any additional genes with median FUBAR/FEL breadth > ",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " are also labeled."
    # ),
    # caption = paste0(
    #   "Pair-level significance comes from the BH-corrected permutation test; the x-axis is a descriptive gene-ordering quantity, not a significance threshold. ",
    #   "The >",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " label rule is used only to highlight candidate genes for literature follow-up."
    # )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11
  ) 

p_bridge_clean

p_bridge_clean <- p_bridge_clean + theme_bold1

p_bridge_clean

ggsave("supple_lollipop.tiff",plot = p_bridge_clean, height = 12, width = 18)

bridge_fig_df$pair_label

#subsets for plotting individually

bile_fatty_df <- bridge_fig_df %>%
  filter(pair_label == "Bile acid biosynthesis & metabolism ↔ Fatty acid & cholesterol metabolism\nobs = 32, BH-adjusted p = 0.000")

bile_retinoid_df <- bridge_fig_df %>%
  filter(pair_label == "Bile acid biosynthesis & metabolism ↔ Retinoid / vitamin A metabolism\nobs = 17, BH-adjusted p = 0.007")

glycine_df <- bridge_fig_df %>%
  filter(pair_label == "Glycine metabolism ↔ Taurine and cysteine metabolism\nobs = 15, BH-adjusted p = 0.005")


#new themes for each plot 


theme_bold2 <-  theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    #  Panel 
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),

    #  Axis titles 
    axis.title.x = element_blank(
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    
    #  Axis text  
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18, face = "bold", color = "black"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", color = "black"
    ),
    #  Axis lines 
    axis.line = element_line(size = 0.9, color = "black"),

    #  Facet strips 
    strip.text = element_text(
      size = 24, face = "bold",
      margin = margin(t = 4, b = 4)
    ),
    strip.background = element_rect(
      fill = "grey94",
      color = "grey55",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ),

    #  Legend 
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text  = element_text(),
    
    #  Plot title & caption 
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 8.5, hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 10)
    )
)


theme_bold3 <-  theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    #  Panel 
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),

    # Axis titles
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 24, face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Axis text 
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18, face = "bold", color = "black"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", color = "black"
    ),
    # Axis lines 
    axis.line = element_line(size = 0.9, color = "black"),

    # Facet strips 
    strip.text = element_text(
      size = 24, face = "bold",
      margin = margin(t = 4, b = 4)
    ),
    strip.background = element_rect(
      fill = "grey94",
      color = "grey55",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ),

    #  Legend
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text  = element_text(),
    
    #  Plot title & caption
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 8.5, hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 10)
    )
)
  
  
#plot

p_bridge_BileFatty <- ggplot(
  bile_fatty_df,
  aes(x = median_breadth_ff, y = pair_gene)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = median_breadth_ff, yend = pair_gene),
    color = "grey88",
    linewidth = 1.6
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +
geom_point(
  aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
  shape = 21,
  size = 4,
  color = "black",
  stroke = 0.3
) +
# ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
#   data = bridge_fig_df %>% filter(!label_flag),
#   aes(
#     label = gene),
#   size = 4.0,
#   color = "black",
#   segment.color = "grey20",
#   segment.size = 0.3,
#   force = 0.25,                
#   max.overlaps = Inf,
#   direction = "y",
#   hjust = 0,
#   nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.25) +
ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
  data = bile_fatty_df %>% filter(label_flag),
  aes(label = gene),
  size = 6,
  color = "grey20",
  segment.color = "grey35",
  segment.size = 0.4,
  direction = "y",
  hjust = 0,
  nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.025,
  box.padding = 0.2,
  point.padding = 0.15,
  max.overlaps = Inf,
  min.segment.length = 0
)+
  facet_wrap(~ pair_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1, labeller = labeller(
    pair_label = function(x) sub("\n.*$", "", x)
  )) +
scale_y_discrete(
  labels = function(x) sub("^.*___", "", x)
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, x_max_bridge * 1.08),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.08))
  ) +
  scale_fill_grey(
    start = 0.75,
    end = 0.25,
    name = "Methods supporting\npositive selection"
  ) +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    # x = "Median gene-level positive-site breadth across FUBAR and FEL\n(proportion of codon sites inferred as positively selected; descriptive ordering only)",
    # y = NULL,
    # title = "Bridge genes contributing to significant pathway-pair overlaps",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Only pathway pairs with BH-adjusted permutation significance are shown. ",
    #   "All displayed genes were supported in >= ", min_methods_support,
    #   " methods and annotated to both pathways in the pair. ",
    #   "Within each pair, genes are ordered by tool support first, then by median FUBAR/FEL breadth. ",
    #   "Top ", n_label_per_pair, " genes per pair are labeled, and any additional genes with median FUBAR/FEL breadth > ",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " are also labeled."
    # ),
    # caption = paste0(
    #   "Pair-level significance comes from the BH-corrected permutation test; the x-axis is a descriptive gene-ordering quantity, not a significance threshold. ",
    #   "The >",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " label rule is used only to highlight candidate genes for literature follow-up."
    # )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11
  ) 

p_bridge_BileFatty

p_bridge_BileFatty <- p_bridge_BileFatty + theme_bold2

p_bridge_BileFatty

ggsave("BILEFattysupple_lollipop.tiff",plot = p_bridge_BileFatty, height = 8, width = 18)



p_bridge_Bile_retinoid <- ggplot(
  bile_retinoid_df,
  aes(x = median_breadth_ff, y = pair_gene)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = median_breadth_ff, yend = pair_gene),
    color = "grey88",
    linewidth = 1.6
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +
geom_point(
  aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
  shape = 21,
  size = 4,
  color = "black",
  stroke = 0.3
) +
# ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
#   data = bridge_fig_df %>% filter(!label_flag),
#   aes(
#     label = gene),
#   size = 4.0,
#   color = "black",
#   segment.color = "grey20",
#   segment.size = 0.3,
#   force = 0.25,                
#   max.overlaps = Inf,
#   direction = "y",
#   hjust = 0,
#   nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.25) +
ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
  data = bile_retinoid_df %>% filter(label_flag),
  aes(label = gene),
  size = 6,
  color = "grey20",
  segment.color = "grey35",
  segment.size = 0.4,
  direction = "y",
  hjust = 0,
  nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.025,
  box.padding = 0.2,
  point.padding = 0.15,
  max.overlaps = Inf,
  min.segment.length = 0
)+
  facet_wrap(~ pair_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1, labeller = labeller(
    pair_label = function(x) sub("\n.*$", "", x)
  ) ) +
scale_y_discrete(
  labels = function(x) sub("^.*___", "", x)
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, x_max_bridge * 1.08),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.08))
  ) +
  scale_fill_grey(
    start = 0.75,
    end = 0.25,
    name = "Methods supporting\npositive selection"
  ) +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  # labs(
  #   x = "Median gene-level positive-site breadth across FUBAR and FEL\n(proportion of codon sites inferred as positively selected; descriptive ordering only)",
    # y = NULL,
    # title = "Bridge genes contributing to significant pathway-pair overlaps",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Only pathway pairs with BH-adjusted permutation significance are shown. ",
    #   "All displayed genes were supported in >= ", min_methods_support,
    #   " methods and annotated to both pathways in the pair. ",
    #   "Within each pair, genes are ordered by tool support first, then by median FUBAR/FEL breadth. ",
    #   "Top ", n_label_per_pair, " genes per pair are labeled, and any additional genes with median FUBAR/FEL breadth > ",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " are also labeled."
    # ),
    # caption = paste0(
    #   "Pair-level significance comes from the BH-corrected permutation test; the x-axis is a descriptive gene-ordering quantity, not a significance threshold. ",
    #   "The >",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " label rule is used only to highlight candidate genes for literature follow-up."
    # )
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11
  ) 

# p_bridge_Bile_retinoid
# 
# p_bridge_Bile_retinoid <- p_bridge_Bile_retinoid + theme_bold2
# 
# p_bridge_Bile_retinoid
# 
# ggsave("BILERetnoidsupple_lollipop.tiff",plot = p_bridge_Bile_retinoid, height = 5, width = 18)



p_bridge_Glycine <- ggplot(
  glycine_df,
  aes(x = median_breadth_ff, y = pair_gene)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = median_breadth_ff, yend = pair_gene),
    color = "grey88",
    linewidth = 1.6
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +
geom_point(
  aes(fill = support_n, alpha = label_flag),
  shape = 21,
  size = 4,
  color = "black",
  stroke = 0.3
) +
# ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
#   data = bridge_fig_df %>% filter(!label_flag),
#   aes(
#     label = gene),
#   size = 4.0,
#   color = "black",
#   segment.color = "grey20",
#   segment.size = 0.3,
#   force = 0.25,                
#   max.overlaps = Inf,
#   direction = "y",
#   hjust = 0,
#   nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.25) +
ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
  data = glycine_df %>% filter(label_flag),
  aes(label = gene),
  size = 6,
  color = "grey20",
  segment.color = "grey35",
  segment.size = 0.4,
  direction = "y",
  hjust = 0,
  nudge_x = x_max_bridge * 0.025,
  box.padding = 0.2,
  point.padding = 0.15,
  max.overlaps = Inf,
  min.segment.length = 0
)+
  facet_wrap(~ pair_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1, labeller = labeller(
    pair_label = function(x) sub("\n.*$", "", x)
  )) +
scale_y_discrete(
  labels = function(x) sub("^.*___", "", x)
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, x_max_bridge * 1.08),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.08))
  ) +
  scale_fill_grey(
    start = 0.75,
    end = 0.25,
    name = "Methods supporting\npositive selection"
  ) +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Median gene-level positive-site breadth across FUBAR and FEL\n(proportion of codon sites inferred as positively selected; descriptive ordering only)",
    y = NULL,
    # title = "Bridge genes contributing to significant pathway-pair overlaps",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Only pathway pairs with BH-adjusted permutation significance are shown. ",
    #   "All displayed genes were supported in >= ", min_methods_support,
    #   " methods and annotated to both pathways in the pair. ",
    #   "Within each pair, genes are ordered by tool support first, then by median FUBAR/FEL breadth. ",
    #   "Top ", n_label_per_pair, " genes per pair are labeled, and any additional genes with median FUBAR/FEL breadth > ",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " are also labeled."
    # ),
    # caption = paste0(
    #   "Pair-level significance comes from the BH-corrected permutation test; the x-axis is a descriptive gene-ordering quantity, not a significance threshold. ",
    #   "The >",
    #   scales::percent(label_breadth_cut, accuracy = 1),
    #   " label rule is used only to highlight candidate genes for literature follow-up."
    # )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11
  ) 

p_bridge_Glycine

p_bridge_Glycine <- p_bridge_Glycine + theme_bold3

p_bridge_Glycine

ggsave("Glycinesupple_lollipop.tiff",plot = p_bridge_Glycine, height = 5, width = 18)



## =========================================================
##  suppl data 
## =========================================================

bridge_rank_qc <- significant_pair_driver_genes_ranked %>%
  mutate(
    high_breadth_candidate = median_breadth_ff > label_breadth_cut,
    top_flag = driver_rank_within_pair <= n_label_per_pair,
    label_flag = top_flag | high_breadth_candidate,
    label_reason = case_when(
      top_flag & high_breadth_candidate ~ "top_rank_and_high_breadth",
      top_flag ~ "top_rank",
      high_breadth_candidate ~ "high_breadth_only",
      TRUE ~ "unlabeled"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    path1, path2, gene,
    driver_rank_within_pair,
    support_n, support_methods,
    median_breadth_ff,
    high_breadth_candidate, top_flag, label_flag, label_reason,
    n_pathways, pathway_list,
    fubar_breadth, fel_breadth, meme_breadth,
    fubar_n_sig, fel_n_sig, meme_n_sig,
    p_bh
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_bh, path1, path2, driver_rank_within_pair)

bridge_rank_qc <- bridge_rank_qc %>%
  rename(
    category1 = path1,
    category2 = path2,
    n_functional_categories = n_pathways,
    functional_category_list = pathway_list
  )


bridge_rank_qc #%>% View()

write.csv(bridge_rank_qc, file = "bridge_rank_QC.csv")

```






## FIGURE 3E: absrel
genes farther right = supported on more distinct terminal branches
bigger points = support appears in more partitions
darker-filled points = higher median supported omega
colored outlines = which pathway dominates
triangles + grey side text = multi-pathway genes

....Which genes show the most recurrent terminal-branch (ones w/full annotation) aBSREL support, and are those genes concentrated in particular pathway contexts?

inset is answering a different question. It does not summarize genes. It uses all branch-level baseline omega values and compares their distributions across functional_category categories with one-vs-rest Wilcoxon tests, then BH-corrects those p-values. A star appears only when both raw p < 0.05 and BH-adjusted p <= 0.10

Main panel = recurrent gene-level accumulation of supported terminal-branch signal
Inset = pathway-level distributional context for branch-level baseline omega
```{r}

OMEGA_CAP <- 100

# -----------------------------
# user options
# -----------------------------
ABSREL_P_THRESH <- 0.05
ABSREL_Q_THRESH <- 0.10
MIN_BRANCHES_MAIN <- 2
MIN_PARTITIONS_MAIN <- 0
TOP_GENES_MAIN <- 25

# -----------------------------
# helpers
# -----------------------------
extract_species <- function(x) {
  str_match(x, "^[^_]+_([A-Z]+_[A-Z]+(?:_[A-Z]+)?)_ENS")[, 2] |>
    str_replace_all("_", " ")
}

# -----------------------------
# input
# -----------------------------
function_metadata <- read_csv("gene_sets_union.csv")

absrel_res <- read.csv("tabsrel_summary.csv") %>%
  tidyr::extract(
    col = gene_id,
    into = c("gene_id", "partition"),
    regex = "^(.*?)(part.*)$",
    remove = FALSE
  )

function_metadata <- function_metadata %>%
  rename(functional_category = pathway_label)

absrel <- absrel_res %>%
  left_join(function_metadata, by = c("gene_id" = "symbol")) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(branch_id, "^NODE")) %>%
  mutate(
    functional_category  = coalesce(functional_category, pathway_key, "unknown"),
    baseline_omega = pmin(aBSREL_baseline_omega, OMEGA_CAP),
    p_raw = pmin(
      coalesce(aBSREL_pvalue_uncorrected,
               aBSREL_pvalue_corrected,
               aBSREL_pvalue),
      1
    ),
    lrt            = aBSREL_LRT,    
    positive_omega_classes  = aBSREL_positive_omega_classes,  
    positive_omega_weights  = aBSREL_positive_omega_weights,
    gene          = gene_id,
    species_label = extract_species(branch_id),
    label_text    = paste(gene, species_label, sep = ", ")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(branch_id),
    !is.na(gene),
    !is.na(species_label),
    !is.na(partition),
    !is.na(baseline_omega),
    !is.na(functional_category),
    !is.na(p_raw)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj_dataset = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH"),
    supported_branch_global = p_raw < ABSREL_P_THRESH & p_adj_dataset <= ABSREL_Q_THRESH
  )

# -----------------------------
# partition ordering
# -----------------------------
partition_levels <- absrel %>%
  distinct(partition) %>%
  mutate(part_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(str_extract(partition, "\\d+")))) %>%
  arrange(part_num, partition) %>%
  pull(partition)

absrel <- absrel %>%
  filter(!str_detect(branch_id, regex("NODE", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%  
  group_by(gene) %>%
  mutate(n_seqs_gene = n_distinct(branch_id)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(n_seqs_gene >= 5) %>% 
  mutate(partition = factor(partition, levels = partition_levels))

absrel <- exorcise(absrel, "gene_id")

# =========================================================
#  globally supported terminal branches
# =========================================================
absrel_supported <- absrel %>%
  filter(supported_branch_global)

# supported branches with omega > 1 for positive-branch omega summaries
absrel_supported_pos <- absrel_supported %>%
  filter(baseline_omega > 1)

# =========================================================
#  summarize supported branches by gene
#    omega summaries use only globally supported branches with omega > 1
# =========================================================
absrel_gene_summary <- absrel_supported %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(
    n_supported_branch_obs = n(),
    n_unique_supported_terminal_branches = n_distinct(branch_id),

    n_partitions_supported = n_distinct(as.character(partition)),
    partitions = paste(sort(unique(as.character(partition))), collapse = "; "),

    n_species_observed = n_distinct(species_label),
    species = paste(sort(unique(species_label)), collapse = "; "),

    n_pathways_supported = n_distinct(functional_category),
    pathways = paste(sort(unique(functional_category)), collapse = " | "),
    dominant_pathway = names(sort(table(functional_category), decreasing = TRUE))[1],

    n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1 = n_distinct(branch_id[baseline_omega > 1]),

    median_supported_omega_pos = {
      x <- baseline_omega[baseline_omega > 1]
      if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    q90_supported_omega_pos = {
      x <- baseline_omega[baseline_omega > 1]
      if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else quantile(x, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    max_supported_omega_pos = {
      x <- baseline_omega[baseline_omega > 1]
      if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    },

    min_p_raw = min(p_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_p_adj_dataset = min(p_adj_dataset, na.rm = TRUE),
    exemplar_species = species_label[which.max(baseline_omega)],
    exemplar_label = label_text[which.max(baseline_omega)],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n_supported_branches = n_unique_supported_terminal_branches
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_unique_supported_terminal_branches >= MIN_BRANCHES_MAIN |
      n_partitions_supported >= MIN_PARTITIONS_MAIN |
      n_pathways_supported > 1
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(n_unique_supported_terminal_branches),
    desc(n_partitions_supported),
    desc(n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1),
    desc(median_supported_omega_pos),
    gene
  )

# keep only top recurrent genes for the main panel
absrel_top_genes <- absrel_gene_summary %>%
  slice_head(n = TOP_GENES_MAIN)



gene_levels <- absrel_top_genes %>%
  arrange(
    n_supported_branches,
    n_partitions_supported,
    median_supported_omega_pos,
    gene
  ) %>%
  pull(gene)

absrel_top_genes <- absrel_top_genes %>%
  mutate(
    gene = factor(gene, levels = gene_levels),
    dominant_pathway = factor(dominant_pathway),
    pathway_note = if_else(n_pathways_supported > 1, pathways, NA_character_)
  )

# =========================================================
#  main panel
# =========================================================
x_max_absrel <- max(absrel_top_genes$n_supported_branches, na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(x_max_absrel) || x_max_absrel <= 0) {
  x_max_absrel <- 1
}

#title and subtitle

    # title = "Recurrent aBSREL-supported signal across top genes",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Main panel summarizes genes with globally supported terminal branches ",
    #   "(raw p < ", ABSREL_P_THRESH,
    #   ", dataset-wide BH-adjusted q <= ", ABSREL_Q_THRESH,
    #   "). X = number of unique supported terminal branches; point size = number of supported partitions. ",
    #   "Point fill shows the median baseline omega among supported branches with omega > 1. ",
    #   "Small grey text marks pathway categories for multi-pathway genes."


pABSREL_main <- ggplot(
  absrel_top_genes,
  aes(x = n_supported_branches, y = gene)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      xend = n_supported_branches,
      yend = gene,
      color = dominant_pathway
    ),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.55,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(
      size = n_partitions_supported,
      fill = median_supported_omega_pos,
      color = dominant_pathway,
      shape = n_pathways_supported > 1
    ),
    stroke = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
      scale_color_manual(values = Category)+
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = as.character(gene)),
    size = 0,
    box.padding = 0.22,
    point.padding = 0.14,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    seed = 1,
    color = "black",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = absrel_top_genes %>% filter(n_pathways_supported > 1, !is.na(pathway_note)),
    aes(
      x = n_supported_branches + max(0.18, 0.03 * x_max_absrel),
      y = gene,
      label = pathway_note
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust = 0.35,
    hjust = -0.03,
    size = 2.85,
    color = "grey15",
    lineheight = 0.95
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(`FALSE` = 21, `TRUE` = 24),
    labels = c(`FALSE` = "single-Category gene", `TRUE` = "multi-Category gene"),
    name = "Category context"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(2.5, 6.5),
    breaks = sort(unique(absrel_top_genes$n_partitions_supported)),
    name = "Supported partitions"
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "grey85",
    high = "grey15",
    na.value = "grey92",
    name = "Median baseline omega\namong supported branches\nwith omega > 1"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = pretty_breaks(),
    limits = c(0, x_max_absrel * 1.55),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.04))
  ) +
  labs(
    # title = "Recurrent aBSREL-supported signal across top genes",
    # subtitle = paste0(
    #   "Main panel summarizes genes with globally supported terminal branches ",
    #   "(raw p < ", ABSREL_P_THRESH,
    #   ", dataset-wide BH-adjusted q <= ", ABSREL_Q_THRESH,
    #   "). X = number of unique supported terminal branches; point size = number of supported partitions. ",
    #   "Point fill shows the median baseline omega among supported branches with omega > 1. ",
    #   "Small grey text marks pathway categories for multi-pathway genes."
    # ),
    x = "Unique supported terminal branches",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Dominant Category"
  ) +
  guides(color = "none")+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey20"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "grey15"),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "grey10"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "grey10"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey35"),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) 
pABSREL_main <- pABSREL_main + theme_bold

# =========================================================
# branch-level companion table for displayed genes
# =========================================================
absrel_branch_table <- absrel_supported %>%
  semi_join(absrel_top_genes %>% select(gene), by = "gene") %>%
  left_join(
    absrel_top_genes %>%
      select(
        gene,
        n_supported_branch_obs,
        n_unique_supported_terminal_branches,
        n_supported_branches,
        n_partitions_supported,
        n_pathways_supported,
        dominant_pathway,
        pathways,
        n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1,
        median_supported_omega_pos,
        q90_supported_omega_pos,
        max_supported_omega_pos
      ),
    by = "gene"
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(n_unique_supported_terminal_branches),
    desc(n_partitions_supported),
    gene,
    desc(baseline_omega),
    p_raw,
    species_label
  ) %>%
  select(
    gene,
    species_label,
    functional_category,
    partition,
    baseline_omega,
    p_raw,
    p_adj_dataset,
    supported_branch_global,
    n_supported_branch_obs,
    n_unique_supported_terminal_branches,
    n_supported_branches,
    n_partitions_supported,
    n_pathways_supported,
    dominant_pathway,
    pathways,
    n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1,
    median_supported_omega_pos,
    q90_supported_omega_pos,
    max_supported_omega_pos
  )

absrel_branch_table

# compact gene-level table for writeup
absrel_gene_table <- absrel_top_genes %>%
  select(
    gene,
    dominant_pathway,
    n_supported_branch_obs,
    n_unique_supported_terminal_branches,
    n_supported_branches,
    n_partitions_supported,
    n_pathways_supported,
    pathways,
    n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1,
    median_supported_omega_pos,
    q90_supported_omega_pos,
    max_supported_omega_pos,
    min_p_raw,
    min_p_adj_dataset,
    exemplar_species
  )

absrel_gene_table

# =========================================================
# pathway inset
# revert to all branch-level baseline omega values by pathway
# sideways, consistent with MEME / FEL / FUBAR
# =========================================================
path_order <- absrel %>%
  group_by(functional_category) %>%
  summarise(med = median(baseline_omega, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(med) %>%
  pull(functional_category)

pathway_plot_df <- absrel %>%
  mutate(
    functional_category = factor(functional_category, levels = path_order)
  )

sig_tbl <- tibble(functional_category = levels(pathway_plot_df$functional_category)) %>%
  mutate(
    p_value = purrr::map_dbl(functional_category, \(pw) {
      x <- pathway_plot_df$baseline_omega[pathway_plot_df$functional_category == pw]
      y <- pathway_plot_df$baseline_omega[pathway_plot_df$functional_category != pw]
      if (length(x) < 2 || length(y) < 2) NA_real_
      else wilcox.test(x, y, exact = FALSE)$p.value
    }),
    median_pathway = purrr::map_dbl(functional_category, \(pw)
      median(pathway_plot_df$baseline_omega[pathway_plot_df$functional_category == pw], na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    median_rest = purrr::map_dbl(functional_category, \(pw)
      median(pathway_plot_df$baseline_omega[pathway_plot_df$functional_category != pw], na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_median = median_pathway - median_rest,
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    sig_both = !is.na(p_value) & !is.na(p_adj) & p_value < 0.05 & p_adj <= 0.10
  )

star_df_absrel <- pathway_plot_df %>%
  group_by(functional_category) %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(baseline_omega, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    y = pmax(y_max * 1.35, y_max + 0.05)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    sig_tbl %>% select(functional_category, sig_both),
    by = "functional_category"
  ) %>%
  filter(sig_both)

upper_lim_absrel <- max(
  c(pathway_plot_df$baseline_omega, star_df_absrel$y, 0.05),
  na.rm = TRUE
) * 1.05



pathway_plot_df$functional_category <- factor(
  pathway_plot_df$functional_category,
  levels = Category_order
)

star_df_absrel$functional_category <- factor(
  star_df_absrel$functional_category,
  levels = Category_order
)

#title and subtitle 
    # title = "Distributions of branch-level baseline omega by pathway",
    # subtitle = "* shown only when raw p < 0.05 and BH-adjusted p <= 0.10 in one-vs-rest Wilcoxon tests",


p_inset_absrel <- ggplot(
  pathway_plot_df,
  aes(functional_category, baseline_omega, color = functional_category)
) +
  geom_violin(
    fill = "grey90",
    color = "grey45",
    scale = "width",
    alpha = 0.55,
    linewidth = 0.35
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.18,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = NA,
    color = "grey20",
    linewidth = 0.30
  ) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 0.9, alpha = 0.75, stroke = 0.2,
              show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_label(
    data = star_df_absrel,
    aes(functional_category, y),
    label = "*",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black",
    label.size = 0,
    size = 10.0,
    label.padding = grid::unit(0.05, "lines")
  ) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  scale_color_manual(values = Category) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(sigma = 0.01),
    limits = c(0, upper_lim_absrel),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.20)),
    name = "Baseline omega across all terminal branches"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    # title = "Distributions of branch-level baseline omega by Category",
    # subtitle = "* shown only when raw p < 0.05 and BH-adjusted p <= 0.10 in one-vs-rest Wilcoxon tests",
    color = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(4, 18, 4, 4),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white", linewidth = 0.4),  
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
  )+inset_style()

p_inset_absrel

# =========================================================
#  final composed figure
# =========================================================
pABSREL_final <- pABSREL_main +
  patchwork::inset_element(
    p_inset_absrel,
    left = 0.60,
    right = 0.98,
    bottom = 0.42,
    top = 0.72,
    align_to = "panel"
  )

pABSREL_final

absrel_supp_main <- absrel_supported %>%
  semi_join(absrel_top_genes %>% select(gene), by = "gene") %>%
  transmute(
    gene,
    species_label,
    functional_category,
    partition,
    baseline_omega          = round(baseline_omega, 4),
    lrt                     = round(lrt, 4),
    p_raw                   = signif(p_raw, 4),
    p_adj_dataset           = signif(p_adj_dataset, 4),
    supported_branch_global,
    positive_omega_classes,
    positive_omega_weights
  ) %>%
  arrange(gene, desc(baseline_omega), p_raw, species_label)

absrel_supp_inset <- sig_tbl %>%
  transmute(
    functional_category,
    n_path = purrr::map_int(functional_category, ~ sum(pathway_plot_df$functional_category == .x)),
    n_rest = purrr::map_int(functional_category, ~ sum(pathway_plot_df$functional_category != .x)),
    med_path = round(median_pathway, 4),
    med_rest = round(median_rest, 4),
    delta_median = round(delta_median, 4),
    p_raw = signif(p_value, 4),
    p_bh = signif(p_adj, 4),
    sig_both
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_bh, p_raw)


ggsave("Fig3ABSREL.E.tiff",plot = pABSREL_main, height = 8, width = 15)


ggsave("Fig3ABSRELinset.E.tiff",plot = p_inset_absrel, height = 8, width = 15)


absrel_top_genes <- absrel_top_genes %>%
  rename(
    n_functional_categories_supported = n_pathways_supported,
    functional_categories = pathways,
    dominant_functional_category = dominant_pathway,
    functional_category_note = pathway_note
  )

# write.csv(breadth_test, file="breadth_test_ABSREL.csv")
# write.csv(intensity_test, file = "intensity_test_ABSREL.csv")
write.csv(absrel_top_genes, file = "absrel_top_genes.csv" )
write.csv(absrel_supp_inset, file = "absrel_supp_inset.csv")
write.csv(absrel_supp_main, file = "absrel_supp_main.csv" )


```

#SupplTable
```{r}


# 
# 
# absrel_gene_summary_full <- absrel_supported %>%
#   group_by(gene) %>%
#   summarise(
#     n_supported_branch_obs = n(),
#     n_unique_supported_terminal_branches = n_distinct(branch_id),
# 
#     n_partitions_supported = n_distinct(as.character(partition)),
#     partitions = paste(sort(unique(as.character(partition))), collapse = "; "),
# 
#     n_species_observed = n_distinct(species_label),
#     species = paste(sort(unique(species_label)), collapse = "; "),
# 
#     n_categories_supported = n_distinct(functional_category),
#     categories = paste(sort(unique(functional_category)), collapse = " | "),
#     dominant_category = names(sort(table(functional_category), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
# 
#     n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1 =
#       n_distinct(branch_id[baseline_omega > 1]),
# 
#     median_supported_omega_pos = {
#       x <- baseline_omega[baseline_omega > 1]
#       if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
#     },
#     q90_supported_omega_pos = {
#       x <- baseline_omega[baseline_omega > 1]
#       if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else quantile(x, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
#     },
#     max_supported_omega_pos = {
#       x <- baseline_omega[baseline_omega > 1]
#       if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
#     },
# 
#     min_p_raw = min(p_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
#     min_p_adj_dataset = min(p_adj_dataset, na.rm = TRUE),
#     exemplar_species = species_label[which.max(baseline_omega)],
#     exemplar_label = label_text[which.max(baseline_omega)],
#     .groups = "drop"
#   ) %>%
#   mutate(
#     n_supported_branches = n_unique_supported_terminal_branches,
#     category_note = if_else(n_categories_supported > 1, categories, NA_character_)
#   ) %>%
#   arrange(
#     gene,
#     desc(n_unique_supported_terminal_branches),
#     desc(n_partitions_supported)
#   )
# 
# # absrel_gene_summary_full <- absrel_gene_summary_full %>%
# #   rename(
# #     dominant_category = dominant_pathway,
# #     categories = pathways,
# #     n_categories_supported = n_pathways_supported
# #   )
# 
# absrel_full_primategene_table <- absrel_supported %>%
#   select(
#     species_label,
#     gene,
#     functional_category,
#     partition,
#     baseline_omega,
#     p_raw,
#     p_adj_dataset,
#     supported_branch_global
#   ) %>%
#   left_join(
#     absrel_gene_summary_full %>%
#       select(
#         gene,
#         n_supported_branch_obs,
#         n_unique_supported_terminal_branches,
#         n_supported_branches,
#         n_partitions_supported,
#         n_categories_supported,
#         dominant_category,
#         categories,
#         n_supported_terminal_branches_omega_gt1,
#         median_supported_omega_pos,
#         q90_supported_omega_pos,
#         max_supported_omega_pos,
#         min_p_raw,
#         min_p_adj_dataset,
#         exemplar_species
#       ),
#     by = "gene"
#   ) %>%
#   arrange(
#     gene,
#     species_label,
#     desc(baseline_omega),
#     p_raw
#   )
# 
# 
# absrel_full_primategene_table <- absrel_full_primategene_table %>%
#   rename(
#  functional_categories =  categories
#   )
# 
# 
# absrel_full_primategene_table
# 
# write.csv(absrel_full_primategene_table, file = "absrel_full_primategene_table.csv")

bile_fat_genes <- unique(bile_fatty_df$gene)


bile_fat_branches <- absrel_supported %>%
  filter(
    gene %in% bile_fat_genes,
    baseline_omega > 1,
    supported_branch_global == TRUE
  ) %>%
  count(species_label, sort = TRUE)



library(purrr)

species_enrichment <- map_df(unique(absrel_supported$species_label), function(sp) {
  df <- absrel_supported %>%
    filter(species_label == sp) %>%
    distinct(gene, functional_category, hit = (baseline_omega > 1 & supported_branch_global))

  k <- sum(df$hit & df$functional_category %in% c("Bile acid biosynthesis & metabolism",
                                                  "Fatty acid & cholesterol metabolism"))
  K <- sum(df$functional_category %in% c("Bile acid biosynthesis & metabolism",
                                         "Fatty acid & cholesterol metabolism"))
  n <- sum(df$hit)
  N <- nrow(df)

  tibble(
    species = sp,
    p_hyper = phyper(k - 1, K, N - K, n, lower.tail = FALSE),
    k = k, K = K, n = n, N = N
  )
})

set.seed(123)

all_genes <- unique(absrel_supported$gene)

# observed recurrence
obs <- absrel_supported %>%
  filter(
    gene %in% bile_fat_genes,
    baseline_omega > 1,
    supported_branch_global
  ) %>%
  count(species_label, name = "obs_hits")

# permutation
perm_results <- replicate(5000, {
  perm_genes <- sample(all_genes, length(bile_fat_genes))
  absrel_supported %>%
    filter(
      gene %in% perm_genes,
      baseline_omega > 1,
      supported_branch_global
    ) %>%
    count(species_label) %>%
    pull(n)
}, simplify = FALSE)

perm_df <- tibble(
  species_label = obs$species_label,
  obs_hits = obs$obs_hits,
  p_perm = map_dbl(obs$obs_hits, function(x) {
    mean(unlist(perm_results) >= x)
  })
)


gene_branch_counts <- absrel_supported %>%
  filter(baseline_omega > 1, supported_branch_global) %>%
  count(gene, name = "n_supported_branches")

bile_fat_genes <- unique(bile_fatty_df$gene)

bile_fat_branch_counts <- gene_branch_counts %>%
  filter(gene %in% bile_fat_genes)

k <- sum(gene_branch_counts$gene %in% bile_fat_genes & gene_branch_counts$n_supported_branches > 0)
K <- sum(gene_branch_counts$gene %in% bile_fat_genes)
n <- sum(gene_branch_counts$n_supported_branches > 0)
N <- nrow(gene_branch_counts)

p_hyper_gene <- phyper(k - 1, K, N - K, n, lower.tail = FALSE)
p_hyper_gene

obs_total_branches <- sum(bile_fat_branch_counts$n_supported_branches)

set.seed(123)

all_genes <- unique(gene_branch_counts$gene)
n_bile <- length(bile_fat_genes)

perm_totals <- replicate(5000, {
  perm_genes <- sample(all_genes, n_bile)
  sum(gene_branch_counts$n_supported_branches[gene_branch_counts$gene %in% perm_genes])
})

p_perm_gene <- mean(perm_totals >= obs_total_branches)
p_perm_gene

gene_species_matrix <- absrel_supported %>%
  mutate(hit = as.integer(baseline_omega > 1 & supported_branch_global)) %>%
  group_by(gene, species_label) %>%
  summarise(hit = max(hit), .groups = "drop") %>%   # collapse duplicates
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = species_label,
    values_from = hit,
    values_fill = 0
  )


library(vegan)

bile_fat_matrix <- gene_species_matrix %>%
  filter(gene %in% bile_fat_genes) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene")

jaccard_matrix <- vegdist(bile_fat_matrix, method = "jaccard")

jaccard_matrix

row_sums <- rowSums(bile_fat_matrix)
row_sums

bile_fat_matrix_filtered <- bile_fat_matrix[rowSums(bile_fat_matrix) > 0, ]

jaccard_matrix1 <- vegdist(bile_fat_matrix_filtered, method = "jaccard")
 

hc <- hclust(jaccard_matrix1, method = "average")
plot(hc)

tiff("bilefat_jaccard_dendrogram.tiff", width = 2000, height = 1600, res = 300, compression = "lzw")
plot(hc, main = "Bile-Fat Gene Convergence Dendrogram", xlab = "", sub = "")
dev.off()


library(pheatmap)

Heatmap_Bile <- pheatmap(as.matrix(bile_fat_matrix),
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         color = c("white", "black"))

Heatmap_Bile

write.csv(
  bile_fat_branches,
  file = "bile_fat_branch_recurrence.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


write.csv(
  species_enrichment,
  file = "species_enrichment_bilefat_genedrivers.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


write.csv(
  perm_df,
  file = "species_permutation_bilefat_genedrivers.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


write.csv(
  gene_branch_counts,
  file = "gene_branch_counts_allgenes.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  bile_fat_branch_counts,
  file = "gene_branch_counts_bilefat_only.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


write.table(
  data.frame(p_hyper_gene = p_hyper_gene),
  file = "genelevel_hypergeometric_bilefat.txt",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)


write.table(
  data.frame(
    obs_total_branches = obs_total_branches,
    p_perm_gene = p_perm_gene
  ),
  file = "genelevel_permutation_bilefat.txt",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)


write.csv(
  gene_species_matrix,
  file = "gene_species_hit_matrix.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


write.csv(
  bile_fat_matrix,
  file = "bilefat_gene_species_matrix_raw.csv"
)

write.csv(
  bile_fat_matrix_filtered,
  file = "bilefat_gene_species_matrix_filtered.csv"
)


write.csv(
  as.matrix(jaccard_matrix),
  file = "jaccard_matrix_raw.csv"
)


write.csv(
  as.matrix(jaccard_matrix1),
  file = "jaccard_matrix_filtered.csv"
)


write.csv(
  as.matrix(bile_fat_matrix),
  file = "bilefat_heatmap_matrix.csv"
)

library(grid)

png("Heatmap_Bilefat.tiff", width = 2000, height = 2400, res = 300)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(Heatmap_Bile$gtable)
dev.off()



```
